features: White, Grey, Green, Light Brown Assorted
SILKY SMOOTH SKIN: This will exfoliate your skin for a silky smooth feel. Loofah is soft to the touch, but rough enough to give you smooth, silky skin
The bath puff is made from fully recyclable material, high quality, durable shower sponges that will not fall apart
description: Product Description Loofah Sponge Shower Puffs Bath sponges set packed in 4 different colors. Loofah sponge has a silky soft and dense mesh which is very absorbance and will not require a ton of bath scrubber to get a good foam. The shower puff is made from PE material, it stay tight and keep their shapes for a long time uses, will not come apart easily. Shower puffs has a soft braided rope which is convenient to be rise dry and save space, it will not scratch your body. Help you gently exfoliates skin and cleanses skin pores, leave you with a healthier, silky smooth skin. Great for showering and exfoliation. Soft and Dense High pressure low density polyethylene. Not loose, well organized. Produce Thick, Rich Foam Foam up nicely with little body wash, thoroughly remove dirt from body, skin feels refreshing and comfortable.
